visa.title: National Visa Types
visa.description: Portugal (D1–D8 overview)Official overview of temporary stay, residency, and job-seeker visa categories.

visa.title: Tech Visa
visa.description: Portugal (official visa portal)Simplifies hiring non-EU highly qualified workers in tech; company must be IAPMEI-certified.

visa.title: EU Blue Card
visa.description: PortugalPortugal-specific Blue Card conditions (salary threshold, eligible professions); no standalone PT gov page exists in English.

visa.title: Startup Visa
visa.description: Portugal Visa PortalVisa portal info on the Startup Visa program (application process, requirements, links to IAPMEI).

visa.title: D2 Entrepreneur Visa
visa.description: Start or invest in a business in PortugalBusiness plan + proof of funds; broader than StartUP Visa (covers any viable business).

visa.title: D8 Digital Nomad Visa
visa.description: PortugalD8 visa for remote workers earning ≥4× Portuguese minimum wage; 4-month entry → AIMA residence permit. Details under 'D8' on the visa types page.

visa.title: D2 Entrepreneur Visa
visa.description: Also covers freelancers in PortugalBroader path than D8; for freelancers providing services relevant to Portuguese economy.

visa.title: D7 Passive Income Visa
visa.description: For retirees & passive-income holdersNOT for active freelancing (use D8 instead); min. ~€920/mo passive income.

visa.title: Portugal Golden Visa (ARI)
visa.description: Investment residence permitManaged by AIMA (replaced SEF in 2023). Real estate path closed. VC fund route (€500K min.) and other qualifying investments remain..
